Field.name: PrimaryKey
Field.comment: Unique identifier of each record in this table

Field.name: CreationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was created

Field.name: CreatedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who created each record

Field.name: ModificationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was last modified

Field.name: ModifiedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who last modified each record

Field.name: Number of text fields
Field.comment: Amount of textfields to override.

Field.name: Number of media containers
Field.comment: Amount of media containers to override

Validation.Message: "Block type cannot be empty for a block template!"

Field.name: CA number of media containers OLD
CA number of value fields OLD
Base Project
Field.comment: Which base project code used for this learning programme

Field.name: Description URL
Field.comment: Link to a description of how this block works.

Field.name: IO enabled
Field.comment: Decides if this Block uses IOs or not.

Field.name: Block page type
Field.comment: Used for VL when page type is special and not default

Calculation.Text: 0+Sum ( FAT Block::Number of page item instances)

Field.name: IO Type Legacy
Field.comment: The IO type of the primary IO - for blocks developed before March 2022

Field.name: IO Read Backend
Field.comment: For blocks developed before March 2022

Field.name: IO Write Backend
Field.comment: For blocks developed before March 2022

Field.name: IO input information Legacy
Field.comment: Displayed for user during input - for blocks developed before March 2022

Field.name: List enabled
Field.comment: Decides if this Block uses a List or not. Will not export to FAT Block. Not sure this is in use (SEPT 2022)

Field.name: Preview BlockJSON
Field.comment: This JSON is not used in any export - only for preview during development

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ json1 = PrettifyDash ( Name ); json2 = json1 ]; JSONFormatElements ( JSONSetElement ( json2 ; ["symbol_template_id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString] ) ) )

Field.name: List template id
Field.comment: Id for content array template

Field.name: IO Type Array
Field.comment: Type of IOs for an array. Decides if a block utilizes an IO Array or not. Introduced March 2022

Calculation.Text: Case (Block page type ≠ "default"; Block page type &": " & Name ; Name)

Field.name: IO write enabled
Field.comment: Decides if the block WRITE to an IO. Used for automatic creation IOs in IO Page item setting

Calculation.Text: Case ( Number of text fields =0 ; ""; Number of text fields = 1; Label override text 1; Number of text fields = 2; Label override text 1 & ", " & Label override text 2; Number of text fields = 3; Label override text 1 & ", " & Label override text 2 & ", " & Label override text 3; Number of text fields = 4; Label override text 1 & ", " & Label override text 2 & ", " & Label override text 3 & ", " & Label override text 4; Number of text fields = 5; Label override text 1 & ", " & Label override text 2 & ", " & Label override text 3 & ", " & Label override text 4 & ", " & Label override text 5; Number of text fields = 6; Label override text 1 & ", " & Label override text 2 & ", " & Label override text 3 & ", " & Label override text 4 & ", " & Label override text 5 & ", " & Label override text 6; Number of text fields = 7; Label override text 1 & ", " & Label override text 2 & ", " & Label override text 3 & ", " & Label override text 4 & ", " & Label override text 5 & ", " & Label override text 6 & ", " & Label override text 7 )
Case ( Number of media containers =0 ; ""; Number of media containers = 1; Label override media 1; Number of media containers = 2; Label override media 1 & ", " & Label override media 2 )

Field.name: Codebase version Introduced
Field.comment: From which version of the Funkis Player will this Block work

Field.name: Codebase version Deprecated
Field.comment: To which version of the Funkis Player will this Block work

Field.name: Description for authors
Field.comment: A calculated field where authors can copy and paste text without changing description

Calculation.Text: Description & "¶¶" & Case ( Label override text 1= "Text 1 id"; "No text input fields"; "Text input fields: " & Label override text 1) & Case ( Label override text 2= "Text 2 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 2) & Case ( Label override text 3= "Text 3 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 3) & Case ( Label override text 4= "Text 4 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 4) & Case ( Label override text 5= "Text 5 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 5) & Case ( Label override text 6= "Text 6 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 6) & Case ( Label override text 7= "Text 7 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 7) & ".¶¶" & Case ( Label override media 1= "Media 1"; "No media input fields"; "Media input fields: " & Label override media 1) & Case ( Label override media 2= "Media 2"; ""; ", " & Label override media 2) & ".¶¶" /* & Case ( FAT Block::Number of page item instances = 0 ; "This block is not yet being used in this title."; FAT Block::Number of page item instances = 1 ; "This block is used 1 time in this title."; "This block is used " & FAT Block::Number of page item instances & " times in this title." ) & "¶¶"*/

Field.name: Sub editor page type
Field.comment: If this block has a sub-editor, i.e Quiz input where pages can be viewed in a page item card window on top of page item. Leave blank for no sub-editor (default)

Field.name: Score generation enabled Codebase version
Field.comment: From which version of the Funkis Player will this Block will genereta a score if score is applied

Calculation.Text: Case ( Not IsEmpty (Codebase version Introduced ) And Not IsEmpty ( Codebase version Deprecated ); // both introduced and deprecated "Block introduced in version " & Codebase Version @ Blocktemplate Introduced::Version string & " and was deprecated in version " & Codebase Version @ Blocktemplate Deprecated::Version string & "."; Not IsEmpty ( Codebase version Deprecated ); "Block was deprecated in version " & Codebase Version @ Blocktemplate Deprecated::Version string & "."; Not IsEmpty ( Codebase version Introduced ); "Block introduced in version " & Codebase Version @ Blocktemplate Introduced::Version string & "."; "No information of block codebase." )

Field.name: ModifierArray for AI
Field.comment: Exported once and used for AI prompting

Calculation.Text: "[" & Substitute ( List ( ModifierTemplate @ BlockTemplate::ModifierData for AI ); "¶"; ",") & "]"

Field.name: IOArray for AI
Field.comment: Exported once and used for AI prompting

Calculation.Text: "[" & Substitute ( List ( IO Block Template::IOData for AI ); "¶"; ",") & "]"

Field.name: LabelJSON
Field.comment: Creates a JSON with all text field labels

Calculation.Text: Let ( json = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["text_1_label" ; Label override text 1 ; JSONString]; ["text_2_label" ; Label override text 2 ; JSONString]; ["text_3_label" ; Label override text 3 ; JSONString]; ["text_4_label" ; Label override text 4 ; JSONString]; ["text_5_label" ; Label override text 5 ; JSONString]; ["text_6_label" ; Label override text 6 ; JSONString]; ["text_7_label" ; Label override text 7 ; JSONString] ); JSONFormatElements ( json ) )

Field.name: IO Field List Sync
Field.comment: Decides if the block needs to select a list (for categorise) BEFORE adding IO to array. Affects FAT functionality only. Sept 2025

Field.name: Insight enabled
Field.comment: Decides if page items will use standard read-write context for IO Values.

Field.name: AI aspect enabled
Field.comment: Decides if page items will use aspects interface for AI and Insight
